description.en: Character offset into the line where the error occurred. The first column is numbered 0.

excerpt.es: Character offset into the line where the error occurred. The first column is numbered 0.
excerpt.en: Character offset into the line where the error occurred. The first column is numbered 0.

description.en: Setting this attribute to a non-zero integer causes the attributes to be reported as a list rather than a dictionary. The attributes are presented in the order found in the document text. For each attribute, two list entries are presented: the attribute name and the attribute value. (Older versions of this module also used this format.) By default, this attribute is false; it may be changed at any time.
